title: Speaking (v3)
surface: src/routes/speaking/+page.svelte (new — does not exist in v2)
summary: New /speaking surface for the Conference Circuit persona. Bio variants (50/100/250), headshot library, topic list (5 talks), past-talks credit with honest 'writing-first' floor, routes to single general inquiry path.

strategy.decision: Build a dedicated /speaking surface (none exists in v2). Three copy-pasteable bio variants + two-aspect headshot library + 5 named topics with format hints + on-the-record credits + general inquiry CTA with subject template.
strategy.why: Closes D3 (Conference Circuit persona has no funnel today). Implements P0-2 prescription. Cohort-differentiator per peer-cohort.md § Cross-cohort observations — NONE of the 7 audited peer sites has a /speaking page; building one differentiates this funnel completely. Curators can slate without leaving the site.
strategy.shipped: No equivalent. v2's /about does not provide bio variants, headshot, or topic list. Conference Circuit visitors bounce.
strategy.gap: v2: persona has no funnel. v3: full slate-ready surface.
strategy.question: Are 5 topics the right number? Stage 4 fact-check verifies each topic anchors to 2+ existing Signal Dispatch posts; thinner topics get cut or get posts written before launch.

currentState.summary: v2 has no speaking surface. /about is the closest analog.
currentState.annotation: v3 introduces a wholly new surface.
